name: reporook
description: Deterministic repository security scans with plain-English triage and verified remediation workflows.

interface.shortDescription: Scan, understand, fix, and verify code risks.
interface.longDescription: RepoRook combines deterministic local scanning with Codex reasoning while preserving evidence, approval, and verification boundaries.
defaultPrompt: Scan this repository and explain what must be fixed before release.
Review my current changes for security regressions.
Help me fix and verify this RepoRook finding.
